title: SugarRush
description: adds compact sugar and other cool items and effects to your game
body:
"Get some sugar coated carrots."
sugar rush is a cool mod i am making that adds 3 new effects and 9 new items with 2 more to come
Items:
sugar coated carrot.,
sugar coated potato.,
sugar coated beetroot.,
sugar coated apple.,
caramel apple.,
compact sugar.,
diamond compact sugar.,
sugar jar.,
diamond sugar jar.,
Effects
Sugar Rush:
Speed 3.
Strength 1.
Regeneration 1.
Sugar crash: 
you take 3 hearts of magic damage every so often tell effect clears negates armor (obviously)
Sugar High:
works the same as Sugar Rush just you don't get a Sugar Crash.

All of these are fully coded textured and added to the game 

WIP ITEMS:
Sugar Coated Sweet Berries.,
French Toast.,

Item notes: when you craft sugar coated foods you always get 7 of them
